summary: UI/UX polish review for OraOne — AuraOrb loaders + EmptyState wiring + Navbar route fixes. 11/11 acceptance criteria PASS. Login still works end-to-end (/login → /app/overview, token persisted in localStorage 'oraone_access_token', length 1070). Marketing Navbar Login/Start Free now correctly navigate to in-app /login and /signup (no Cognito Hosted UI redirect). /__loaders showcase renders all 9 sections (Full Page Light, Full Page Dark, Button/Inline/Dots, Chat Typing, Skeletons, Empty State, Progress Stages, Top Progress Bar, Page Transition) with no runtime errors. Conversations empty-state (data-testid=conv-list-empty) renders 'No conversations match' with AuraOrb SVG + 'Clear filters' button; clicking it resets the list back to 8 items. Conversation panel still updates correctly when clicking a list item — no regression. KnowledgeBase empty-state (data-testid=kb-empty-state) renders 'No documents match' with AuraOrb + 'Clear search' button that clears the input and restores the list. Leads page KPI cards + table still render normally (6 rows of mock data), leads-empty-state correctly NOT shown. Backend smoke checks: /api/health 200, /api/auth/login returns access_token (1070 chars), /api/auth/me returns full user profile.
critical_code_review_comments: EmptyState renders the action button data-testid as `${testId}-action` (e.g., conv-list-empty-action, kb-empty-state-action). Worth documenting this convention in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds.js so the next testing agent doesn't have to grep for it.

/app/frontend/src/pages/dashboard/Conversations.jsx is approaching 449 lines — consider splitting ConversationPanel into its own file (already factored, just verify import path) to keep the page module under 400 lines.

Cookie banner overlays the top of the marketing pages — confirmed it does NOT intercept clicks on nav-login-btn / nav-start-free-btn in headless mode, but on smaller viewports it could overlap the navbar. Consider z-index review.

Console emits multiple Recharts 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings on the /app/overview page (visible in the post-login screenshot logs). Not blocking, but indicates a ResponsiveContainer parent without explicit dimensions — likely on the leaderboard or sparkline cards. Worth wrapping in a sized container.
test_credentials: test@gmail.com / OraOne@2026 (Cognito CONFIRMED user, verified working)
seed_data_creation: None — all tests use existing mock/seed data already loaded in the app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI polish features verified. EmptyState action button selectors follow the pattern `${testId}-action` and `${testId}-secondary` (e.g., conv-list-empty-action, kb-empty-state-action). The /__loaders dev route is publicly accessible without auth and renders 12 SVGs across 9 labeled sections. Recharts width/height warnings on /app/overview are harmless but noisy — possible future cleanup. Login token is stored under localStorage key 'oraone_access_token' (NOT 'access_token').
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found, all acceptance criteria passed.
